user.title: Seismic World Earthquakes
user.description: Configure this monitoring instance. You can create multiple instances to monitor different areas or magnitude thresholds.

data_description.min_magnitude: Only earthquakes equal to or above this magnitude will be included (0.0–9.9).
data_description.max_events: Maximum number of earthquakes displayed on the map (50–500). Events with M≥6.0 are always kept regardless of this limit.
data_description.sort_by: Defines the order in which earthquakes appear on the map and in sensors.

area.title: Custom Area Configuration
area.description: Define the geographic area to monitor. All earthquakes within the specified radius of the centre point will be included.

data_description.latitude: Latitude of the centre of the monitored area (−90 to 90).
data_description.longitude: Longitude of the centre of the monitored area (−180 to 180).
data_description.radius_km: Radius in kilometres around the centre point (10–20,000 km).

filters.title: Filters & Alert Sensor
filters.description: Optionally restrict which earthquakes are shown, and configure the earthquake alert binary sensor.

data.only_tsunami: Only show events with tsunami warning

data_description.min_alert_level: Filter earthquakes by USGS PAGER alert level. Select 'None' to show all events regardless of alert level.
data_description.max_depth_km: Maximum focal depth in km (0–700). Set to 700 to include earthquakes at any depth. Shallow events (< 70 km) are generally more destructive.
data_description.only_reviewed: When enabled, only shows earthquakes that have been manually reviewed by USGS. More accurate but may appear with a delay.
data_description.alert_min_magnitude: The earthquake alert binary sensor turns ON when an earthquake of this magnitude or greater is detected within the time window.
data_description.alert_time_window: How many hours back to look when evaluating the earthquake alert binary sensor (1–72 hours).

error.invalid_coordinates: Invalid coordinates. Latitude must be between −90 and 90, longitude between −180 and 180.
error.invalid_radius: Radius must be between 10 and 20,000 km.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the USGS API. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Please check the Home Assistant logs for more details.

init.description: Update the basic settings for this monitoring instance.
